advancement.unusual_prehistory.breed_hol: Breed a pair of Holocene animals
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_eg: Recreate your first prehistoric egg or embryo
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_fo: Use a Brush to uncover fossils at a Fossil Site or Tar Pit
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_ho: Find the remains of a recently extinct creature
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_li: Create a Living Ooze in a cauldron to incubate embryos with
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_ma: Find some Machine Parts in a loot chest
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_or: Craft some Organic Ooze to fuel the revival process
advancement.unusual_prehistory.obtain_tr: Craft a Transmogrifier, the key component in creature revival
advancement.unusual_prehistory.pacify_mo: Feed an Enchanted Golden Apple to an aggressive creature to make it permanently neutral
advancement.unusual_prehistory.revive_ki: The man on the street will not be able to remember this.
advancement.unusual_prehistory.root.desc: Revive creatures from the ancient past!
effect.unusual_prehistory.fury.descripti: Gain increased speed and attack speed as your health gets lower
item.unusual_prehistory.paleopedia.desc: By Dr. Professor Peeko Noneyah Jr., PhD.
unusual_prehistory.patchouli.book.landin: This book acts as a guide to the revival process of various ancient plants and animals, along with any notable traits or uses that they may have.
unusual_prehistory.patchouli.book.name: Paleopedia
